title: CITResewnBackwardsCompat
description: CITResewn 1.21 backwards compatibility, allowing users to define nbt to component mapping rules. Has specific patches for Hypixel+.
body:
A fork of [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for 1.21 backwards compatibility, allowing users to define nbt to component mapping rules. Has specific patches for Hypixel+.


To setup the nbt to component compatibility for packs other than Hypixel+, you will need to edit `(minecraft install dir)/config/citresewn/nbttocomponents.properties`, to specify global nbt rules.

Note for resource packs creators: `nbt.ExtraAttributes` is automagically mapped to the `minecraft:custom_data` component.
